title: Office of Naval Research
description: ONR Global serves as the conduit between the Office of Naval Research, the Naval Research Enterprise, the naval fleet/forces and the international science and technology communities.
text:
2024 ONR GLOBAL PROSPECTUS
The 2024 Prospectus highlights the innovative efforts of ONR Global's technical departments and business operations team that directly contribute to America's military excellence. These efforts are laser-focused on bolstering warfighting readiness and lethality for the U.S. Navy and Marine Corps by identifying, shaping, and leveraging global science and technology into game-changing innovative research.
While showcasing only a fraction of the organization's work, the 2024 Prospectus demonstrates ONR Global's commitment to fostering existing relationships and forging new connections within the domestic and international scientific community. These connections are vital for supporting Sailors and Marines and enhancing the warfighting capabilities of the U.S. military, embodying the trifold philosophy: Warfighter First, Constant Improvement, ONR Global Family.
Discover how we are ensuring America's competitive edge in warfighting readiness and lethality. The Prospectus details our approach working closely with the U.S. Navy Research and Development Enterprise (NR&DE) and a global network of international science and technology allies and partners encompassing both academic and military institutions to extend ONR Global's global reach and impact in support of the warfighter.
